subject: [PATCH v2 17/21] nfsd: move nfsd_debugfs_init() after nfsd4_init_slabs() in init_nfsd()

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch moves the initialization of NFS debugfs to after slab allocation in the init_nfsd function, ensuring that debugfs files are properly cleaned up when slab allocation fails. The patch also updates the unwind paths for both the init_nfsd error path and exit_nfsd function to match reverse-initialization order, which is a cleanup with no functional change.
